bouquets.name: Spring Elegance
bouquets.description: A delicate blend of peonies, tulips, and roses — perfect for springtime gifting and bright smiles.

bouquets.name: Berry Chic
bouquets.description: A stylish composition of roses, seasonal greenery and vibrant berries — a bold and elegant floral statement.

bouquets.name: Lavender Dream
bouquets.description: A rich bouquet with lavender, lisianthus, and roses — ideal for those who love deep hues and gentle fragrance.

bouquets.name: Golden Hour
bouquets.description: Warm sun-kissed hues of amber, gold and peach — the perfect gift to brighten anyone's day.

bouquets.name: White Romance
bouquets.description: A timeless arrangement of white roses and cream blooms — pure, elegant and deeply romantic.

bouquets.name: Peach Sunset
bouquets.description: Soft peach and coral tones blended with lush foliage — warm, radiant, and full of life.

bouquets.name: Peach Meadow
bouquets.description: A soft and radiant arrangement of peach and blush roses with lush greenery in a straw basket — light and natural.

bouquets.name: Blush Romance
bouquets.description: A premium bouquet of deep pink and ivory roses, complemented by silver eucalyptus — sophisticated and intimate.

bouquets.name: Pastel Garden
bouquets.description: A pastel-toned mix of spray roses and greenery in a woven basket — gentle, airy, and perfect for any occasion.

bouquets.name: Tulip Charm
bouquets.description: A vivid bouquet of bright tulips and roses in a lavender box — cheerful and full of charm.

bouquets.name: Berry Bloom
bouquets.description: A lush mix of rich pink, purple, and cream blooms with textured greens — romantic and elegant.

bouquets.name: Sweet Whisper
bouquets.description: A tender arrangement of soft pastel blooms — a quiet, heartfelt gift.

bouquets.name: Field Joy
bouquets.description: A cheerful bunch of wildflowers in mixed colours — fresh, rustic and full of countryside spirit.

bouquets.name: Soft Bloom
bouquets.description: A vintage-styled bouquet on a dark background — refined, moody and quietly luxurious.

bouquets.name: Rosy Morning
bouquets.description: Fresh garden roses with a touch of eucalyptus — bright and uplifting.

bouquets.name: Ivory Grace
bouquets.description: Elegant ivory blooms for weddings and tender occasions.

bouquets.name: Autumn Ember
bouquets.description: Warm seasonal tones of rust, amber and deep red.

bouquets.name: Classic Charm
bouquets.description: A timeless mixed bouquet that suits any room and any mood.

bouquets.name: Pink Serenade
bouquets.description: Layers of pink petals wrapped with care.

bouquets.name: Pure Vows
bouquets.description: Crisp white florals composed for the big day.

bouquets.name: Summer Breeze
bouquets.description: Light, airy seasonal blooms in soft colours.

bouquets.name: Heritage Mix
bouquets.description: A classic florist's mix with rich greenery.

bouquets.name: Coral Crush
bouquets.description: Vibrant coral roses that command attention.

bouquets.name: Eternal Lace
bouquets.description: Delicate lace-like whites for romantic moments.

bouquets.name: Harvest Glow
bouquets.description: Seasonal warmth captured in a single bouquet.

bouquets.name: Cottage Posy
bouquets.description: A charming, understated classic posy.

bouquets.name: Velvet Rouge
bouquets.description: Deep red roses with a velvet feel.

bouquets.name: Bridal Whisper
bouquets.description: Subtle, soft tones for an intimate ceremony.

bouquets.name: Golden Field
bouquets.description: Sun-drenched seasonal stems tied loosely.

bouquets.name: Timeless Bloom
bouquets.description: An evergreen classic arrangement.

bouquets.name: Rose Aura
bouquets.description: A glowing halo of premium roses.

bouquets.name: Pearl Veil
bouquets.description: Pearl-white florals with delicate accents.

feedbacks.author: Emma T.
feedbacks.text: Flora made my anniversary unforgettable with their beautiful arrangement!

feedbacks.author: Daniel R.
feedbacks.text: Absolutely stunning bouquet! It looked even better than the photo and arrived right on time.

feedbacks.author: Olivia M.
feedbacks.text: The service was exceptional, and the flowers were fresh!

feedbacks.author: Sophia L.
feedbacks.text: Ordered for my mother’s birthday and she was thrilled. The colours were vivid and lasted for weeks.

feedbacks.author: James P.
feedbacks.text: Fast delivery and beautiful packaging. Flora is now my go-to florist.

feedbacks.author: Isabella C.
feedbacks.text: The bouquet was elegant and fresh. Highly recommend for any special occasion.

feedbacks.author: Noah W.
feedbacks.text: Great customer service and the flowers arrived exactly as pictured. Very happy!

feedbacks.author: Mia G.
feedbacks.text: Every arrangement I’ve ordered has been a work of art. Consistent quality every time.

feedbacks.author: Liam H.
feedbacks.text: Surprised my partner and she loved it. The ribbon detail was a lovely touch.
